DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S LATE RESPONSES WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $920, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions; Declarations Of Kathleen Maylin And Alison Cubre In Support
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alison Cubre, Atty. for defendant and moving party: S.F. Unified School District
MelvinS, Hodges, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Joan Raulston-Turner

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses is granted. Plaintiff's late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $920, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
